agent_guidance: The torch.compile troubleshooting documentation discusses graph breaks and how to identify them. Use TORCH_LOGS="+dynamo" environment variable to see where graph breaks occur. The TorchDynamo deep dive documentation explains the compilation process. For fullgraph=True mode, the compiler will fail if it encounters unsupported operations instead of silently breaking the graph. Review the error messages to identify which operation is causing the break. The documentation suggests using torch.compiler.disable() to skip compilation for unsupported code sections, or rewriting the code to avoid unsupported patterns.
score_justification: Official docs provide relevant debugging tools (TORCH_LOGS) and general guidance, though may miss specific resolution details.
